mapper.select:
SELECT -- 统计近1个月发布的内容总数 ( (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM foods WHERE status = 1 AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM scenics WHERE status = 1 AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM routes WHERE status = 1 AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM guides WHERE status = 1 AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) ) AS publish_content_total,
-- 统计近1个月的互动总数（点赞+评论+收藏） ( (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM likes WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments WHERE status = 1 AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM collections WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) ) AS interaction_total
